hook.summary: Introduction of the 'God of Sky II' slot game with a POV hook and a 777 symbol.
hook.visual_action: The game logo and a large 777 symbol are centered over a casino background.
hook.text_overlay: POV: YOU JUST FOUND YOUR FAVORITE ROOM TO PLAY
hook.voiceover_transcript: You just found your favorite room to play.

scene_flow: Introduction of the 'God of Sky II' slot game with a POV hook.
Slot machine reels spin with lightning effects and a rising jackpot counter.
Reels land on lightning symbols, triggering a massive gold coin explosion.
End card displays the Huuuge Casino logo and a 'Spin Now' call to action.
on_screen_text: POV: YOU JUST FOUND YOUR FAVORITE ROOM TO PLAY
audience_proxy: Adults 35-65 who enjoy social casino games and the thrill of high-stakes slot machines.
